occurrence_sentence: Maybell Quantum closed a $25 million funding round led by an affiliate of Cerberus Capital Management, L.P.

interaction_phrase: led by an affiliate of Cerberus
occurrence_sentence: Maybell Quantum ("Maybell"), the quantum infrastructure company, has closed a $25 million funding round led by an affiliate of Cerberus Capital Management, L.P. ("Cerberus"), a global leader in alternative investing.

interaction_phrase: in an email interview with The Quantum Insider
occurrence_sentence: "Beyond expanding our manufacturing capabilities, establishing a new production facility, and continuing to invest in our MayQ Labs, this funding will help Maybell continue to invest in the types of game-changing innovations people have come to expect from us," Corban Tillemann-Dick, CEO of Maybell, said in an email interview with The Quantum Insider.

interaction_phrase: led by an affiliate of Cerberus Capital Management, L.P.

interaction_phrase: will join the Maybell Board of Directors
occurrence_sentence: In connection with the investment, Chris Darby, Global Head of Venture Investments at Cerberus, will join the Maybell Board of Directors.

interaction_phrase: the endorsement and support of Chris and the team at Cerberus
occurrence_sentence: We are thrilled to receive the endorsement and support of Chris and the team at Cerberus.

interaction_phrase: Investing alongside Cerberus in the round are Maybell's existing investors, Lavrock Ventures, Mark IV Capital, In-Q-Tel, Decisive Point, Caruso Ventures, and Olive Capital
occurrence_sentence: Investing alongside Cerberus in the round are Maybell's existing investors, Lavrock Ventures, Mark IV Capital, In-Q-Tel, Decisive Point, Caruso Ventures, and Olive Capital.

interaction_phrase: support a supplier ecosystem around that, while enhancing our international footprint for service, support, research, and MayQ Labs
occurrence_sentence: This funding is critical, as it will allow us to dramatically expand US quantum cryogenics production capacity and support a supplier ecosystem around that, while enhancing our international footprint for service, support, research, and MayQ Labs.
